items.title: GE Vernova stock drops around AI concerns, P&G upgraded to Buy
items.description: Market Domination host Josh Lipton and Yahoo Finance senior reporter Brooke DiPalma track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including GE Vernova (GEV) stock dropping amid investor concerns around the future of AI data centers, Jefferies analysts upgrading shares of Procter & Gamble (PG) to a Buy rating, and Gap, Inc. (GAP) receiving two upgrades to Outperform. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.

items.title: Can Procter & Gamble's Innovation Push Keep Margins Intact in FY26?
items.description: PG's insight-led innovation and productivity gains are supporting margins and reinforcing brand leadership in FY26.

items.title: Medline makes Nasdaq debut, Procter & Gamble upgraded to Buy
items.description: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Wednesday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Medical supply company Medline (MDLN) made its debut on the Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) at $35 per share, the biggest public offering of 2025. Procter & Gamble (PG) was upgraded to Buy from Hold by Jefferies. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

items.title: P&G Shares Seen as a Longer-Term Story, Says Deutsche Bank
items.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) is included among the 12 Best Dogs of the Dow to Invest in. On December 8, Deutsche Bank lowered its price target on The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) to $171 from $176 and kept a Hold rating after meeting with management. The firm’s view was that the stock […]

items.title: Pantene Unveils Latest Innovation With "As Seen in Alix’s Shower" in Partnership With Alix Earle
items.description: CINCINNATI, December 17, 2025--Pantene is once again partnering with social media sensation Alix Earle, taking fans back into her shower to introduce Pantene’s latest groundbreaking innovation. Almost a year after Alix’s viral post about Pantene, the #1 most awarded haircare brand* is launching "As Seen in Alix’s Shower," starring the Abundant & Strong 3-Step System. It gives an inside look at the routine that helps Alix maintain her full, healthy hair. Pantene is even offering limited-edition A
